name: immich
description: Photo and video backup with search, AI features, and a built-in database stack

fields.name: IMMICH_PORT
fields.label: App Port
fields.help: The web app will open on this host port.

fields.name: IMMICH_VERSION
fields.label: Immich Version
fields.help: Immich image tag. The official docs use v2 as the default release track.

fields.name: DB_USERNAME
fields.label: Database User
fields.help: Database username used by Immich and Postgres.

fields.name: DB_PASSWORD
fields.label: Database Password
fields.help: Use only letters and numbers to match Immich's recommendation.

fields.name: DB_DATABASE_NAME
fields.label: Database Name
fields.help: Main Postgres database name for Immich.

fields.name: UPLOAD_LOCATION
fields.label: Library Folder
fields.help: Host path where Immich stores uploaded photos and videos.

fields.name: DB_DATA_LOCATION
fields.label: Database Folder
fields.help: Host path for the Postgres database files.

fields.name: MODEL_CACHE_LOCATION
fields.label: Model Cache Folder
fields.help: Host path for machine-learning model cache files.

fields.name: TZ
fields.label: Timezone
fields.help: Optional timezone such as Asia/Dubai or Etc/UTC.

ui.overview: Immich installs the web app, machine learning service, Redis, and Postgres together as one stack.
what_happens: Four containers will be created as one compose project
Your photos and videos will be stored in the library folder you choose
Postgres and model cache data will be stored in their own folders
The web app will open on the port you choose
ui.data_location: Each storage field can be relative to this app's config folder or an absolute path.
